case_title: MARIAH HANSON VS. TIM HUNTER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANSON, MARIAH AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, TIM DOES 1-30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANSON, MARIAH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANSON, MARIAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTER, TIM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 892 RHODE ISLAND AVE. S.F. CA. 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, AND THE PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION HAVING BEEN SERVED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 415.46 FROM ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS , NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
